title: Rust CoAP client uses hardcoded token 'LICH' for every request
description: rust/lichen-coap/src/client.rs:81: every request uses the fixed 4-byte token 'LICH' (0x4c494348). Python/aiocoap randomizes per request; the C client delegates to Zephyr's coap_client (random tokens). With concurrent outstanding requests the Rust client cannot disambiguate responses by token; tokens are also predictable (weakens the token's role as a spoofing barrier on off-path responses). Module docs call it CLI/TUI-grade, hence P2. Fix: random per-request tokens + match responses on (token, source).
